Table of Contents

Interface ITerrainLasDataImporter

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members that handle importing terrain source data in LAS format.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("80E83E8C-2EC1-4090-B399-411FA593B25B")]
public interface ITerrainLasDataImporter : ITerrainDataImporter

AddProperty(esriTerrainLasDataPropertyType, string)

Used to indicate which, if any, LiDAR properties to retain and load into the target feature class in a BLOB field.

void AddProperty(esriTerrainLasDataPropertyType property, string FieldName)

Parameters

property esriTerrainLasDataPropertyType
FieldName string

Sample Snippet

AddReturnNumber(esriTerrainLasReturnType)

Used to indicate which points to extract from the LAS files based on their LiDAR return number.
